name: Beef Jerky - David Horowitz
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze lean beef for 30 minutes.
2. Slice the frozen beef into 1/4 inch thick pieces, removing all visible fat.
3. In a shallow dish, mix soy sauce with lemon pepper and garlic salt to taste.
4. Place the beef slices on cake racks set over cookie sheets.
5. Place the cookie sheets in an oven preheated to 150 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Cook for 10-12 hours, turning the slices occasionally until they reach a jerky-like texture.
7. Store the finished beef jerky in an airtight container.
